item.title: Memory lifecycle + autonomy + trace + learning
item.intent: Manage agent memory across hot/warm/cold tiers so the agent gets smarter over time without bloating context. PII must be masked before cold storage.
item.description: LONG-TERM RETENTION: Memory lifecycle is what makes the agent smarter over time. Hot/warm/cold tiers prevent the 360KB memory bloat problem described in PRODUCT.md. Preference learning is the '6 months' story: 'It knows your top clients are always priority.' Not blocking initial adoption but critical for the 30-day churn metric. Acceptance: hot/warm/cold tiers active; LLM-powered summarization runs on schedule; PII masked before cold tier; agent preference patterns visible to user.
steps: Implement hot/warm/cold memory tiers with lifecycle transitions
Add LLM-powered summarization on configurable schedule
Apply PII masking before cold tier storage
Build autonomy recommendations from preference patterns
acceptanceCriteria: Hot/warm/cold tiers active with automatic lifecycle transitions
PII masked before cold tier storage
Agent preference patterns visible to user
